current.headline: Colombia vs Ghana halftime script rewards exact match reading
current.summary: The halftime score market asks whether Colombia's attack breaks through early, Ghana punish space, both teams trade goals, or the first half stays locked at 0-0.

items.headline: Ghana's defensive start makes halftime more interesting than the final result
items.summary: Ghana can keep the match level through structure and counters, while Colombia's early tempo decides whether the favorite enters halftime ahead.
